ab: karuwa ku kibulas dra paisu kanu?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: daamaw! kiyabulas yu dra munuma?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: abalu ku kemasu dra paisu. karuwa ku kibulas dra paisu kanu?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: adri ku kemasu dra paisu i!
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: abalu ku kemasu dra paisu. karuwa ku kibulas dra paisu kanu?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: aeman! adaman nu kinibulasan na paisu i, adri yu driya parebeliyas kanku.
ch: B:不要!上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: karuwa ku kibulas kanu kiping?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: aiwa! uwa alak yuyu.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: karuwa ku kibulas kanu tilin?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: ku pabulasanay kan Senten lra.
en: B: I lent it to Senten.

ab: pabulasi ku driya kanu didinsiya maw?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: aiwa! amawna, parebeliyasu kanku an daman.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: maaudalr lra! adri ku kemasu dra kalipang. pabulasi ku dra kalipang maw?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

ab: maumau saya ku kalipang. mukasaya ta mikalipang maw!
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: idri na tilin amau nu pinabulas kanku a daman. parebeliyasaw kanu.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: an maranger yu driya menau dra druma dra tilin i, rengayu ku.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: parebelaliyas ku kanu dra paisu an asuwa?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: driyama lra! kiangeru lra an mipaisu yu.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It's okay, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: parebelaliyas yu kanku dra paisu an asuwa?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: ti parebeliyasay yu an daman.
en: A: I'll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: parebelaliyas yu an asuwa kanku tilin?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: ku parebeliyasay yu lra a daman maku?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: idri na tratruri tu pinabulas kanu kan Uratr maku?
en: A: Did Uratr lend you this pen?

ab: aiwa! ku kinibulas a uninan kantaw.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: idri na tratruri nu kinibulas kan Alaw maku?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Alaw?

ab: amelri! tu trinima kan ina.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: uniyan lra dra ateri. uwa kibulas kan Senten dra saima dra ateri.
en: A: We are out of salt, let's go borrow some salt from Senten.

ab: aiwa! kayku kibulasa.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: parebeliyasu ku paisu kayu i Aden.
en: B: Go tell Aden to give me my money back.

ab: mikiyam kanu dra munuma paisu?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
